description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has multiple jobs: run-tests, check_release, check_links, pre_commit, test_minimum_versions, test_prereleases, make_sdist, and test_sdist. The run-tests job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, installing dependencies and running tests. Other jobs perform specific tasks such as checking releases, links, and pre-commit checks.
